title: cotula pyrethrifolia var. linearifolia
intro: Cotula pyrethrifolia var. linearifolia, also known as the Narrow-leaved Cotula or Narrow-leaved Pyrethrum Chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe skin irritations, relieve muscle spasms, and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Cotula pyrethrifolia var. linearifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are typically prepared by steeping the leaves or flowers in hot water or oil.
